title: Ahtna Announces Second Special Shareholder Dividend Distribution for 2020
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Anchorage, Alaska – To assist shareholders who are experiencing economic hardships as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic, the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust have declared a second 2020 special shareholder distribution of $10.00 per share.
